title: RunAgentRequest
description: Request body for creating a new Warp Oz cloud agent run.

prompt.description: The prompt/instruction for the agent to execute. Required unless a skill is specified.

mode.description: Optional query mode for the run.

skill.description: Skill specification to use as the base prompt. Formats: 'repo:skill_name', 'repo:skill_path', 'org/repo:skill_name', 'org/repo:skill_path'.

config.description: Ambient agent configuration for the run

title.description: Custom title for the run (auto-generated if not provided)

team.description: Whether to create a team-owned run. Defaults to true for users on a single team.

agent_identity_uid.description: Optional agent identity UID to use as the execution principal. Only valid for team-owned runs.

conversation_id.description: Optional conversation ID to continue an existing conversation.

attachments.description: Optional file attachments to include with the prompt (max 5).

parent_run_id.description: Optional run ID of the parent that spawned this run (for orchestration hierarchies).

interactive.description: Whether the run should be interactive. Defaults to false.
